creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
Intel ISP2150 server with Adaptec and Vinum crashes when disks are heavily
used, for example in periodic daily.
I've disabled the periodic scripts and it crashed on something else.
It worked flawlessly for a month, and then started crashing, but I suspect
that it's not a hardware problem, but rather the vinum disk got filled a bit.
I've a crash dump so I can dig some information on a request.

Fix: 

I wish I knew :(
How-To-Repeat: 
On this hardware run periodic daily.
